metadata.purpose: SWEObeyMe FDQ (Floating-Point Dynamic Quantization) system mathematical foundations

instructions.addingDocuments: Place open-license math references in the appropriate subfolder. Update this index.json with document metadata.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from MIT OCW, OpenStax, public domain sources, university lecture notes with open licenses, and vendor documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear filenames like: calculus_limits_openstax.pdf, linear_algebra_mit_ocw.pdf
instructions.licenseCompliance: Only include documents with explicit open licenses, educational use permissions, or public domain status.
instructions.fdqFocus: Prioritize resources that teach floating-point behavior, GPU precision, quantization theory, linear algebra, optimization, and error propagation for FDQ system development.
